title: gate_result envelope
description: Envelope for a quality-gate verdict emitted by truth-verifier / fit-evaluator. Pins kind via const and reuses the shared agent_result_v1 base. Gate A content names the offending claims that fail truth verification (TRUTH-03); Gate B/C extend the same shell in Phase 6.

offending_claim.description: A single claim that failed truth verification. claim_index points at the offending item in the draft claims array; rule_violated names the truth rule broken; offending_span is the dotted/indexed source path. Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY.

gate_a_content.description: Gate A (truth) verdict body. gate discriminates the gate variant; verdict is the pass/fail decision; offending_claims lists the failing claims (empty on pass). Self-contained: additionalProperties:false is scoped to this object ONLY, never the allOf envelope. offending_claims items use the ABSOLUTE URN ref so a bare content sub-doc validates as a standalone root.
